sentences.english: I take the school bus every morning.
The bus comes at seven forty-five.
I always sit with my best friend in the back.
sentences.korean: 항상 뒤쪽에서 가장 친한 친구와 앉아요.

sentences.english: We talk about homework and what happened yesterday.
sentences.korean: 숙제와 어제 있었던 일에 대해 이야기해요.

sentences.english: The ride is only about fifteen minutes but it's my favorite part of the morning.
sentences.korean: 15분밖에 안 걸리지만 아침 중 가장 좋아하는 시간이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: First Day at a New Job
